title: Rohida Fort
tagline: Rohida Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Rohida fort / Vichitragad Fort is a fort located 10 km from Bhor, Pune district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Rohida fort / Vichitragad Fort is a fort located 10 km from Bhor, Pune district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Pune district. The fort restoration is done by the Shree Shivdurga Samvardhan committee with the help of forest dept. and local villagers.

topPlaces.name: Bhor State
topPlaces.description: Bhor State was one of the 9-gun salute Maratha princely states of Deccan States Agency. It was the only state belonging to the Poona Agency under the Bombay Presidency, which became later part of the Deccan States Agency.

topPlaces.name: Shreepur, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Shreepur is a village in Malshiras Taluka in the Solapur District of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhor
topPlaces.description: Bhor () is a town and a municipal council in Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhatghar Dam
topPlaces.description: Bhatghar Dam is a gravity dam on the Velvandi (वेळवंडी) river near Bhor, in the Pune district of the state of Maharashtra in India. It is one of the oldest dams in Maharashtra constructed by the British during the time of the British Raj.

items.note: Bhor State was one of the 9-gun salute Maratha princely states of Deccan States Agency. It was the only state belonging to the Poona Agency under the Bombay Presidency, which became later part of the Deccan States Agency.
Shreepur is a village in Malshiras Taluka in the Solapur District of Maharashtra, India.
Bhor () is a town and a municipal council in Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

Bhatghar Dam is a gravity dam on the Velvandi (वेळवंडी) river near Bhor, in the Pune district of the state of Maharashtra in India. It is one of the oldest dams in Maharashtra constructed by the British during the time of the British Raj.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rohida Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rohida Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rohida Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rohida Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rohida Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rohida Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Rohida Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rohida Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhor State, Shreepur, Maharashtra, Bhor, Bhatghar Dam.
